title: Webflow Schemas Index
description: Index of all schemas under agentic/schemas/webflow/. Used for write audit + MCP sync reporting.

schemas.name: WebflowWriteAuditLog
schemas.description: One entry per Webflow mutation. Append to write-audit-log.jsonl. BLOCK tier — required by CLAUDE.md audit trail rule.

schemas.name: McpSyncReport
schemas.description: Result of a Webflow MCP sync operation. Block tier — used to confirm a sync completed before next phase.
